Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Gregory Bulliung, Esq. for Petitioner: Silvia Diaz, present as Guardian at litem for: Jose Diaz, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $82,500.00
Medical Expenses $53,812.15
Costs $3,835.31
The remaining proceeds of $189,852.54 to be placed into an annuity in the name of Jose Diaz and disbursed throughout his life time with a total pay out of $729,891.76 (Exhibit "A")
Counsel to prepare Orders.

June 15, 2005
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed by Comm. Kaplan.
